content.en:
"The Infinite Heavenly Emperor is dead!"

The Taisu Palace Master was a little embarrassed, an Eightfold Dao Realm was killed by Ye Tian like this.

Moreover, Ye Tian really dared to kill.

If you change to the Taibai Sword Master, you won't dare to kill it.

After all, the Wuji Heavenly Emperor was also a formal member of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and his status was on par with that of the Taibai Sword Master.

But Ye Tian is different, Ye Tian is the deacon of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and now he is in charge of the Human Domain, and no one will care if he kills the Wuji Heavenly Emperor within the scope of the Human Domain, and the Innate Origin Domain Alliance will only turn a blind eye and will not say anything.

Of course, this is also because the Wuji Heavenly Emperor has no backer behind him, otherwise it will be in trouble to kill him.

......

The death of the Wuji Heavenly Emperor did not cause any waves.

And not long after, one thing attracted a lot of talk from the Dao Realm, that is, the Wuji Heavenly Palace was gone.

Wuji Heavenly Palace's reputation in the human domain is very bad, and it has offended many forces, and those forces have grown stronger one by one, if they continue to stay in the human domain, there will be no room for survival at all.

Therefore, after they discussed, they decided to leave the human domain and temporarily go to other innate origin domains to seek development.

But no matter which Innate Origin Domain you go to, the situation will not be too good, but it is still better than the situation of the Human Domain.

Ye Tian naturally didn't care about such a trivial matter, and directly let them leave.

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian received a notice that all the deacons of the Innate Origin Domain were going to the Supreme Void for a meeting.

As a result, Ye Tianyi entered the Supreme Void.

The Supreme Void.

In a large hall, a Venerable Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm came here, all of whom were deacons of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

Su Ya also came here, and the Immortal Emperor Su Changsheng also came.

Su Changsheng is now a legendary Dao realm, but he is still a deacon, but a senior deacon.

If you want to become an elder of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, it is not so easy, and you need a certain amount of qualifications and contributions, and Su Changsheng has no doubt that she has not yet met the requirements.

Rumble!!!!

A patriarch and nine elders appeared, and the elders of the Longyan Ancient Emperor were also among them.

"It's the sixteenth elder Mo Xian!"

Many people were surprised that this patriarch actually came.

Mo Xian is an elder from the Mo clan, the Mo clan is a special race, the population is sparse, it is very difficult to cultivate, but every Mo person is very powerful, just the elder level of the Mo people, there are more than twenty, that is to say, there are more than twenty top legends to the Dao realm.

This Mo Immortal Elder rarely showed up, but this time he did.

Moreover, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance rarely holds meetings, and most of them are elders who appear, but this time it should be a very important thing to let the elders come forward.

"I've seen the Sixteenth Elder!"

Many deacons said respectfully.

The sixteenth patriarch Mo Xian said: "This time I summoned you over, there is a very important thing to announce, the sea of fog is about to appear, and the Innate Origin Domain Alliance will send a batch of people to the Dao Realm to enter, whether it is the Ninefold Dao Realm or the Legend Dao Realm, you can choose to go in." However, in the sea of fog, the Supreme Dao Void Demon will also appear, and the battle between them will be very fierce at that time. Moreover, it is difficult to find opportunities in the sea of fog, but once you get them, it is an amazing opportunity. Whether you go in or not depends on your choice!"

Sea of fog?

Ye Tian didn't know what this place was, but after contacting the Immortal Emperor Su Changsheng, he knew.

"Deacon Ye, the Sea of Fog is a strange place, it is outside the Void Domain, and occasionally collides with the Void Domain, there are no creatures in it, only treasure resources, but sometimes it will fall into the strange area of the Sea of Fog, so that it cannot come out. Of course, the greatest danger still comes from the Supreme Void Demons, and they will also enter. "

"There are no ordinary resources in the Sea of Mist, only precious resources, such as the third sequence of Supreme Dao rule items, as well as treasure resources that help improve the body of the strongest legend, etc., and even treasures that make the Legendary Dao Realm achieve the level of the patriarch, but that kind of treasure is very rare, and it has not appeared a few times. "

"I remember the last time the Sea of Fog appeared, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance had successively given birth to six Ninefold Dao Realm who comprehended the rules of the Third Sequence of the Dao Realm, and there was also a Legend Realm Realm who broke through to become a patriarch. "

Su Changsheng introduced.

So, this time, not only the deacons will go, but some of the elders will go as well.

"Immortal Emperor, if you go to the Dao Realm according to legend, wouldn't the Nine Folds Go to the Dao Realm to go to the Sea of Fog to find death?" Ye Tian was puzzled.

"Not really!" "Not really!" the Immortal Emperor introduced: "The Sea of Fog is very peculiar, it does not allow the power of the Supreme Dao rules to be displayed, and it also suppresses the physical power, even if it is the body of the Supreme Dao Legend, it will be greatly suppressed. Therefore, the strength of the Legendary Dao Realm is not much stronger than that of the Nine Folds Dao Realm, and it is still possible to besiege and kill a Legendary Dao Realm by relying on the number of people. Therefore, many top legends to the Dao realm may not dare to enter, and they are afraid of being besieged and killed. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

This sea of fog, he is determined.

The sixteenth patriarch Mo Xian said again: "In this meeting, in addition to talking about Deacon Wuhai, there is one more thing, and that is the number of elders. The Innate Origin Domain Alliance is ready to open six more elder places, which are not limited to the Legendary Dao Realm, that is to say, if the contribution is large enough, even if it is the Ninefold Dao Realm, there is hope to become an Elder. Elders are treated far more than deacons, so you all have a chance. "

At this time, a Legendary Dao Realm Senior Deacon was looking forward to it: "Sixteenth Elder, what is the basis for the selection of the elder quota this time?"

"Kill the Dao Void Demon!" the sixteenth patriarch said, "The six deacons who kill the Dao Void Demon more will be able to obtain the rank of elder." "

"What!"

Many deacons were shocked, this is to encourage them to kill those supreme demons, then the battle between the two sides will be very tragic.

When the time comes, whether it is the Supreme Dao Void Demons or their Supreme Dao Realm, they will all suffer heavy losses!

"Sixteenth Elder, why are you doing this, will there be a bigger conflict?" a legendary Dao realm deacon asked.

"Because the Supreme Dao Void Demon side will also do this, we elders have calculated that this time there will be resources in the Sea of Fog that will allow the Legend's Immortal Dao Realm to advance, either our Innate Origin Domain will give birth to a Patriarch, or their Supreme Dao Void Demon will give birth to a Demon Venerable. In either case, it will make a change in the strength of both sides. Therefore, killing more Supreme Dao Void Demons is to reduce their chances of obtaining such opportunities!"

"That's what happened!"

These legendary Dao realm high-ranking deacons are ready to move, and they all want to enter the sea of fog.

However, this time, there must be many top Legends to the Dao Realm who will also enter, and the chance of their fall is even greater.

But the opportunity to become a patriarch is something that everyone can hope to get.

Once you get it, you can come out early!
